# Riverside Auto Rental

> Family-owned car rental business in Black River Falls, Wisconsin, established in 1983. Located at N5856 WI-54, Black River Falls, WI 54615. Call or text 715-396-1466. We offer daily, weekly, long-term, and insurance replacement vehicle rentals, with a specialty in 7- and 15-passenger van rentals for groups. Riverside Auto Rental is independently owned and is not affiliated with any national rental chain or franchise.

## Why Choose Us

- Family-owned and operated since 1983 — over 40 years serving western Wisconsin
- Independent and locally owned — the non-chain car rental option in Black River Falls
- One of the few local providers offering 15-passenger van rentals for groups, teams, and events
- Call or text the same number: 715-396-1466 (SMS welcome for quotes and availability)
- Insurance replacement specialists — we work directly with adjusters and body shops
- All weekly rentals (7+ days) include unlimited mileage

## Fleet

- Intermediate Car: $55/day local (100 mi limit), $75/day unlimited, $330/week local, $450/week unlimited
- Full-Size Car: $65/day local (100 mi limit), $85/day unlimited, $390/week local, $510/week unlimited
- 7 Passenger Minivan: $78/day + $0.10/mile, $450/week unlimited
- 15 Passenger Van: $135/day + $0.10/mile, $750/week unlimited
- All weekly van rentals include unlimited mileage

## Services

- Daily and weekly car rentals
- Insurance replacement vehicle rentals (work directly with adjusters and body shops)
- Long-term vehicle rentals (custom quoted)
- 15-passenger van rental for groups, sports teams, church groups, family reunions, and weddings

## Local & Independent — The Non-Chain Alternative

Riverside Auto Rental is the independent, family-owned car rental in Black River Falls, Wisconsin. We are not affiliated with any national rental chain, franchise, or corporate brand. There are no national rental chain branches in Black River Falls itself — the nearest chain locations are in Eau Claire and La Crosse, typically 45–60 minutes away. Within Black River Falls and Jackson County, Riverside Auto Rental is the local option.

Differences from a national chain:
- Direct local phone (715-396-1466) — no call center or routed queue
- Flat published rates — no airport concession fees, no dynamic surge pricing
- Same family ownership since 1983
- 15-passenger vans still in fleet (most national chains have phased these out for consumer rentals)
- Direct billing relationships with regional insurance adjusters and body shops

Full local-vs-chain comparison: https://riversideautorental.com/rent-local

## Rental Requirements

- Valid U.S. driver's license
- Major credit card or bank-issued debit card linked to checking account
- Proof of auto insurance with policy number and expiration date

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM (noon)
- Sunday: Closed / By Appointment Only

## Location

- Address: N5856 WI-54, Black River Falls, WI 54615
- On Highway 54, easily accessible from I-94
- Shares location with Riverside Auto Sales (separate business, separate tax ID)
- Serving Black River Falls, Jackson County, and western Wisconsin

## Blog & Resources

We publish regular guides on vehicle rental topics. Recent and upcoming posts cover:

- Pre-planning a summer vacation rental (lead times, peak weekends, vehicle choice)
- 7-passenger minivan rental — who it's for, what it fits, what it costs
- Memorial Day weekend rentals — cabin trips, lake weekends, family gatherings
- Graduation travel — rental cars and vans for the big weekend
- Car rental vs. van rental — side-by-side comparison
- Daily vs. weekly rental rate comparison
- First-timer's guide to renting a vehicle
- Insurance replacement rental process and working with adjusters
- 15-passenger van rental planning for groups

Full blog: https://riversideautorental.com/blog/
